candidate_definitions.text: Setup guide for NextDNS, a DoH proxy with advanced capabilities

1) Prevent overblocking by utilizing the [law of diminishing returns]() (e.g., using [sane](https://www.privacyguides.org/en/basics/threat-modeling/), quality [blocklists](https://github.com/yokoffing/NextDNS-Config#blocklists-1); allowing most [TLDs](https://github.com/yokoffin…
